subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Blessed and All-Merciful Beauty! The grace and favor of the Divine Unity, and His bounty and loving-kindness, raineth down [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای جمال مبارک رحمانک بنده سی حضرت احدیتک لطف و عنایتی و فضل و عاطفتی یاغمورتک
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God
